findings.detail: vik-minikube still shows 'Degraded' (not 'Healthy'). Fix was NOT applied. Two cluster cards exist in Dev/Minikube section: test-cluster-minikube (Degraded) and vik-minikube (Degraded).
'Updated X seconds ago' text visible near stat cards (e.g., 'Updated 12s ago', 'Updated 23s ago').
Refresh button is present (RefreshCw icon + label). However, clicking it did NOT reset the timestamp — timestamp continued incrementing from 12s to 23s without resetting to 'just now'.
